arts.ttl: Fiorentina Seeks Midfield Reinforcements: From Ndour to Cristante
arts.sum: Fiorentina's recent struggles have highlighted a need for physical strength in their midfield, as acknowledged by manager Raffaele Palladino before the match against Torino. Despite having technically gifted players like Cataldi, Adli, Richardson, and Mandragora, the team has lacked solidity since losing Edoardo Bove to injury. This void has contributed to Fiorentina's winless streak dating back to December 8. The post Fiorentina Seeks Midfield Reinforcements: From Ndour to Cristante appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Ex-Roma manager Garcia named Belgium head coach
arts.sum: Rudi Garcia says he is very motivated "to get results back on the rise" after being named Belgium's new head coach.
